name: Bring me a Muscle Drink.
remarks: Buy from Aohige Pharmacy; Unlocks #9 & #10

name: Retrieve the first old document.
remarks: Reach the top of Thebel Block (22F)

name: Shadow Hunting Milestone
remarks: Defeat a total of 100 Shadows; Unlocks #15

name: Treasure Hunting Milestone
remarks: Open a total of 50 treasure chests; Unlocks #16

name: Create a Persona that's level 13 or above.
remarks: Does not need to be fused, only needs to be in Persona stock; Unlocks #6 & #17

name: Create a Persona with Kouha.
remarks: Obtain from Shuffle Time or fuse: Archangel / Unicorn

name: Bring me a Juzumaru.
remarks: Locked Chest (Arqa 36F) - Requires 2 Twilight Fragments

name: Experiment with fortune telling.
remarks: Reach Rank 2 Courage (Ordinary), speak to the fortune teller in Club Escapade at night and pay ¥3,000 for a "Rarity Fortune," then battle a rare Shadow

name: I'd like to try all kinds of drinks.
remarks: Collect 12 different drinks from vending machines; Unlocks #11

name: I'd like to try a beef bowl.
remarks: Buy Umiushi Fan Book from Manga Star Net Café at the strip mall, register on dorm computer, then buy an Umiushi Beef Bowl; Unlocks #57

name: Please prevail in the Big Eater Challenge.
remarks:
After accepting the request, go to Wilduck Burger at night and choose the following options:
• Look away from the burgers
• Eat without stopping
• Imagine something sour;
Unlocks Weekend Wilduck Set available on Saturdays and Sundays; Unlocks #56

name: Bring me pine resin.
remarks: Talk to Yukari in the dorm; Unlocks #13

name: Bring me a handheld game console.
remarks: Talk to Junpei in the dorm

name: Retrieve the second old document.
remarks: Reach Floor 43 of Arqa Block

name: Shadow Hunting Milestone #2
remarks: Defeat a total of 200 Shadows; Unlocks #22

name: Treasure Hunting Milestone #2
remarks: Open a total of 100 treasure chests; Unlocks #32

name: Fusion Series #1: 04.0Emperor, Oberon
remarks: Silky + Archangel = Oberon (with Mazio); Unlocks #25 & #31

name: I'd like to be gifted a bouquet of flowers.
remarks: Buy Rose Bouquet from Rafflesia at Port Island Station; Unlocks #19

name: I want Jack Frost dolls.
remarks: Bring Elizabeth 3 Jack Frost dolls from the Crane Machine

name: Bring me some potent medicine.
remarks: Obtain from the nurse's office in Gekkoukan High School

name: Retrieve the third old document.
remarks: Reach Floor 69 of the Arqa Block

name: Shadow Hunting Milestone #3
remarks: Defeat a total of 300 Shadows; Unlocks #31

name: Persona Fusion Milestone
remarks: Conduct a total of 20 Persona fusions; Unlocks #33

name: Create a Persona that's level 23 or above.
remarks: Allows the creation of King Frost

name: Fusion Series #2: 07.0Chariot, Mithras
remarks: Jack-o'-Lantern + Tam Lin; Level to 26 via Social Links or battles; Unlocks #35

name: Bring me an Onimaru Kunitsuna.
remarks:
Locked Chest (Arqa 54F)
Requires 3 Twilight Fragments

name: Bring me a triangular sword.
remarks: Talk to Mitsuru in the dorm; Unlocks #28

name: Bring me a protein not for pros.
remarks: Talk to Akihiko in the dorm

name: I want to look fashionable.
remarks: After accepting the request, buy Designer Glasses from Escapade Luxuries in Club Escapade for ¥150,000

name: Retrieve the fourth old document.
remarks: Reach Floor 91 of Yabbashah Block

name: Shadow Hunting Milestone #4
remarks: Defeat a total of 450 Shadows; Unlocks #46

name: Treasure Hunting Milestone #3
remarks: Open a total of 150 treasure chests; Unlocks #47

name: Persona Fusion Milestone #2
remarks: Conduct a total of 35 Persona fusions; Unlocks #48

name: Create a Persona with Torrent Shot.
remarks:
Fuse Naga (Nekomata + Berith); Level to 19 via Social Links or battles
Use Skill Card from either Shuffle Time or Mayoido Antiques

name: Fusion Series #3: 09.0Hermit, Mothman
remarks:
Hua Po (with Agilao) + Flauros
Matador + Queen Medb; Use an Agilao Skill Card on Mothman

name: Defeat a rare Shadow #1
remarks: Defeat a Rare Shadow in the Yabbashah Block and bring 1 Rustic Coin to Elizabeth

name: Traverse the Monad Passage.
available: Complete Monad Door on Floor 80 of the Yabbashah Block
remarks: Defeat all the Shadows within the Monad Passage on Floor 91 of the Yabbashah Block

name: I want to eat some chilled taiyaki.
remarks: Buy the School X Site Note from the Suspicious Man in Club Escapade, then use the URL on the shared computer in the dorm. Buy Lukewarm Taiyaki from the school vendor and put it in the refrigerator; Unlocks #52

name: Let me hear music unique to Gekkoukan.
remarks: Enter the PA Room next to Class 2F in Gekkoukan High School; Unlocks #66

name: I'd like to see a pair of Max Safety Shoes.
remarks: Buy from Tanaka's Amazing Commodities for ¥9,800 (7/12); Unlocks #41

name: Bring me the mysterious person's autograph.
remarks: Start President Tanaka's Social Link

name: Please feed the cat.
remarks: Buy Super Cat Food from Aohige Pharmacy and feed the weak cat at the Port Island Station Outskirts 4 times

name: Bring me a Christmas star.
remarks: Talk to Fuuka in the dorm

name: I wish to feel the ocean.
remarks: In Yakushima on 7/20, pick up either the Pretty Seashell near the left side of the wooden bridge, the Strange Seaweed nestled in the water near the wooden bridge's right, Yakushima Wood from the driftwood on the shore near Fuuka, or the Small Crab from the water near the rocks; Only one needed

name: Retrieve the fifth old document.
remarks: Reach Floor 118 of the Yabbashah Block

name: Shadow Hunting Milestone #5
remarks: Defeat a total of 600 Shadows; Unlocks #60

name: Treasure Hunting Milestone #4
remarks: Open a total of 200 treasure chests

name: Persona Fusion Milestone #3
remarks: Conduct a total of 50 Persona fusions

name: Create a Persona that's level 38 or above.
remarks: Allows the creation of Nebiros

name: Perform King and I.
remarks: Fusion Spell Theurgy: King Frost + Black Frost

name: Bring me an Outenta Mitsuyo.
remarks: Create at Mayoido Antiques: Nihil Blade + Black Quartz x5

name: I'd like try a home-cooked meal.
remarks: Cook a meal with someone in the dorm and then give to Elizabeth; Unlocks #53

name: I'd like to see a mysterious potato.
remarks: Grow a Tarukaja Potato using a Buff Potato Sprout on the dorm's rooftop garden and then give to Elizabeth

name: Attempt a hundred shrine visits.
remarks: Pray at Naganaki Shrine on three separate days; Does not use up any time; Unlocks #67

name: I'd like to see proof of a bond.
remarks: Reach max rank with any Social Link

name: Look for the drink with my name.
remarks: Go to Que Sera Sera at the Port Island Station Outskirts with high enough Charm

name: I'd like to try Aojiru.
remarks: After talking to the owner of Aohige Pharmacy, obtain the Vintage Yagen from Mayoido Antiques and trade it for the True Aohige Aojiru; Unlocks new items for sale at the pharmacy

name: I wish to become a straw millionaire.
remarks: After accepting the request, trade the Bandage Wrap to the delinquent at the Port Island Station Outskirts, trade his Student Handbook to the student at the station, trade the Irresistible Catnip to the boy at the strip mall, then bring the Cat Ear Headband to Elizabeth

name: Retrieve the sixth old document.
remarks: Reach Floor 144 of the Yabbashah Block

name: Shadow Hunting Milestone #6
remarks: Defeat a total of 800 Shadows

name: Create a Persona that's level 46 or above.
Fusion Series #4: 06.0Lovers, Titania
remarks: Black Frost (with Matarukaja) + Dominion / Throne; Unlocks #71

name: Fusion Series #5: 01.0Magician, Rangda
remarks: Thoth + Girimekhala; Level to 54+ via Social Links or battle; Unlocks #72

name: Defeat a rare Shadow #2
remarks: Defeat a Rare Shadow in the Tziah Block, then bring 1 Sumptuous Coin to Elizabeth

name: Bring me an Ote-gine.
remarks: Valuable Chest (Tziah 143F)

name: Bring me a giant, creepy doll.
remarks: Check the Laboratory in Gekkoukan's 1F Laboratory Hallway

name: Find me a beautiful tile.
remarks: Go to Mahjong Club "Red Hawk" at the Port Island Station Outskirts with high Courage and pick "rock"

name: Bring me a fruit knife.
remarks: Talk to Shinjiro in the dorm; Unlocks #69

name: Bring me oil.
remarks: Talk to Aigis in the dorm

name: Retrieve the seventh old document.
remarks: Reach Floor 172 of the Tziah Block

name: Fusion Series #6: 11.0Strength, Siegfried
remarks:
Hanuman (with Endure) + Atavaka
Hecatoncheires (Lvl 48 with Endure) + Shiki-Ouji

name: Fusion Series #7: 05.0Hierophant, Daisoujou
remarks:
Rangda + Succubus = Suzaku; Level to 56 via Social Links or battle; Suzaku (with Regenerate 3) + Hariti / Hecatoncheires
Qitian Dasheng (with Regenerate 3) + Thunderbird

name: Bring me a Mikazuki Munechika.
remarks: Create at Mayoido Antiques: Quality Nihil Blade + Emerald x3 + Silver Quartz x2

name: I'd like to try sushi.
remarks: Check Inari Shrine at the Naganaki Shrine with high enough Academics

name: Bring me a Sengoku-era helm.
remarks: Talk to Mr. Ono in the Faculty Office then visit the Faculty Office on 9 separate days

name: Bring me a glasses wipe.
remarks: Talk to Ikutski in the dorm

name: I'd like to walk around Paulownia Mall.
remarks: Go on a date with Elizabeth (Daytime, does not use up any time); Allows the creation of Hua Po

name: I'd like to visit Iwatodai Station.
remarks: Go on a date with Elizabeth; Allows the creation of Thoth

name: I'd like to visit Naganaki Shrine.
remarks: Go on a date with Elizabeth

name: I'd like to visit Gekkoukan High.
remarks: Go on a date with Elizabeth; Cannot be done on weekends or holidays

name: I'd like to visit your room.
remarks: Go on a date with Elizabeth; Allows the creation of Lucifer

name: Retrieve the last old document.
remarks: Reach Floor 198 of the Harabah Block

name: Retrieve the progress report.
remarks: Chest (Harabah 226F)

name: Create a Persona with Tempest Slash.
remarks: Fuse Ose (Mitra + Baphomet); Level to 47 via Social Links or battles

name: Create a Persona with Auto-Maraku.
remarks:
Fuse Hecatoncheires (High Pixie + Atropos); Level to 53 via Social Links or battle
Fuse Ananta (Jatayu + Trumpeter)
Obtain and use an Auto-Maraku Skill Card from Shuffle Time

name: Fusion Series #8: 13.0Death, Alice
remarks: Special Fusion: Pixie + Lilim + Narcissus + Titania

name: Fusion Series #9: 00.0Fool, Loki
remarks: Succubus + Seth; Level to 75 via Social Links or battle; Allows the creation of Masakado

name: Defeat a Greedy Shadow.
remarks: Defeat a rare, giant Treasure Hand Shadow in the Harabah Block and bring Elizabeth 1 Gold Medal; A mini-game where you must pick the right direction to go three times in a row (automatic if using Fuuka's Tartarus Search)

name: Bring me a Rai Kunimitsu.
remarks:
Locked Chest (Harabah 184F)
Requires 3 Twilight Fragments

name: Bring me a Dojigiri Yasutsuna.
remarks:
Locked Chest (Harabah 212F)
Requires 3 Twilight Fragments

name: Bring me a Tonbo-kiri.
remarks: Create at Mayoido Antiques: Nihil Blade + Diamond x5 + Gold Quartz x2

name: Go clean a restroom.
remarks: Head to Port Island Station and clean the restroom above the cinema (select "Scrub hard" twice)

name: Go water the flowers.
remarks: Interact with the flowers on the school rooftop

name: Bring me food for a furry friend.
remarks: Talk to Koromaru in the dorm; Unlocks #95

name: Bring me a Featherman R action figure.
remarks: Talk to Ken in the dorm

name: I'd like to try Oden Juice.
remarks: Buy 1 of every vending machine drink during the Kyoto Trip on 11/17, then talk to the girl by the Persimmon tree in Gekkoukan's corridor

name: Bring me my Christmas present.
remarks: After rescuing the missing person on Floor 56 of the Thebel Block on 6/26 and receiving a Letter of Thanks from Kurosawa, speak to the Eccentric Man on the second floor of the Iwatodai Strip Mall who will give you a Santa Hat and a Christmas Present

name: Fusion Series #10: 16.0Tower, Masakado
remarks: Setanta (Lvl 31 with Charge) + Jack-o'-Lantern = Jikokuten; Jikokuten + Zouchouten + Koumokuten + Bishamonten

name: Defeat the Shadow of the Void.
remarks: Defeat the third and final Shadow in the Monad Passage on Floor 255 of the Adamah Block

name: Bring me a Bloody Button.
remarks: Defeat The Reaper

name: Take out the ultimate adversary.
remarks: Defeat Elizabeth within the Monad Depths on Floor 255 of the Adamah Block; Protagonist only
